text:

Log:

      http://www.midnight-commander.org/wiki/NEWS-4.8.13

  - Use ZIP=${ZIP_CMD} instead of ZIP=${UNZIP_CMD} [1]
  - Change patch files/patch-lib__tty__win, changed by upstream
  - Remove obsolete patch files/patch-mc-wrapper
